name: claude-code-companion
description: Use Claude Code from Codex for review, rescue, and delegated tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate Codex work to Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: A local companion plugin that lets Codex call the installed Claude Code CLI for read-only reviews, adversarial reviews, write-capable rescue tasks, and background jobs.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude to review my current changes.
Delegate this UI task to Claude Code.
